title: Canonicalize nicknames and group names
close_reason: Display name canonicalization implemented: NFC + bidi reject + ZWS strip (U+200B/C/2060/FEFF) + trim + 32-char limit. Wired into SET_NICKNAME and GROUP_CREATE. 12 unit tests, E2E test. DESIGN.md and IMPROVEMENTS.md updated. 2 review rounds; P0=P1=P2=0.
